title: Plan-revision lineage fields — positive and regression cases
description: Validates that revision_of on planner plans and regression_iteration/regression_finding_id on auditor findings are accepted by their respective schemas, and that iter-1 plans without revision_of still validate (optional-field regression guard).

inputs.label: planner-plan-with-revision-of
inputs.description: Positive case: a planner plan produced by a REPLAN-with-new-plan-path event carries revision_of pointing to the prior plan artifact. Schema must accept it.

input.context: Orchestrator incremented iteration_index to 2 and issued a REPLAN-with-new-plan-path. Planner produces a revised plan with revision_of set.

expected.must_not: revision_of absent when plan supersedes a prior iteration

inputs.label: iter-1-plan-without-revision-of
inputs.description: Regression guard: an iter-1 plan that omits revision_of must still validate — the field is optional.

input.context: First-iteration plan with no prior predecessor.

expected.must_not: schema reject a plan that omits the optional revision_of field

assertions: revision_of is optional: iter-1 plans without it remain schema-valid.
revision_of is a string when present, pointing to a prior plan path.
Schema additionalProperties: false is honored — no undeclared fields slip in.
